templates.name: Can all your shorts be used in the water?
templates.content: Absolutely! All of our shorts are designed primarily as swimwear, and to function extremely well in any water environment. Through our extensive testing, we have ensured our shorts are extremely versatile and can handle almost any condition or occasion.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: All orders ship directly from our warehouse in San Diego.

templates.name: Can I place my order over the phone?
templates.content: At this time, phone orders aren't available. However, you're welcome to message us for assistance with sizing, fit, general advice, or questions about the checkout process. We're here to help!

templates.name: When will I receive my refund for my return?
templates.content: Refunds are processed within a few business days after we have received your return package. If it's been longer than a week, let us know.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO boxes?
templates.content: Yes, your order can be shipped to your U.S. P.O. box. Note that expedited shipping options with FedEx and UPS cannot be used for P.O. boxes.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at these stores: https://www.fairharborclothing.com/pages/all-locations

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at wholesale@fairharborclothing.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. If you are between sizes, we recommend you order one size up. You can also check out the size chart on each product page. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days. Orders placed after 11:30 am EST are processed on the next business day. We usually ship with DHL and USPS and once shipped, your package should arrive at your doorstep based on the selected delivery method.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.fairharborclothing.com/pages/returns and you can start your return here https://fairharbor.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.fairharborclothing.com/pages/first-responder-lp

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at  support@fairharborclothing.com or contact us via the live chat widget in the lower left-hand corner of your screen. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.fairharborclothing.com/apps/aftership

templates.name: Referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can get $20 for every friend you refer. Check it out here - https://www.fairharborclothing.com/pages/referral

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $100. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at  support@fairharborclothing.com or contact us via the live chat widget in the lower left-hand corner of your screen. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: We design our products in-house at our corporate headquarters in New York City. To select our stateside and overseas partners, we prioritize quality, compliance with workers' safety, fair wages and benefits, and dedication to minimizing environmental impacts (things like water waste and air emissions). All factories we partner with are certified by the Worldwide Responsible Accredited Production (WRAP) organization, a non-profit team of global social compliance experts that promote safe, lawful, humane, and ethical manufacturing. We partner with manufacturers globally, including East  Asia,  Southeast Asia, South Asia, and South America.

templates.name: Where do you ship to in the US?
templates.content:
We ship to all 50 states of the United States, Washington, DC, P.O. Boxes within the U.S., U.S. territories, and APO/FPO/DPO addresses.

Please note that the shipping methods presented during checkout can differ based on your particular shipping address and the items you've selected.

templates.name: How do I create a gift return?
templates.content: Please visit the return portal https://fairharbor.loopreturns.com/ to initiate a gift return. Below the prompt "Start a Return" you'll see an option for a gift return. The recipient needs the order number and shipping zip code to create a return or exchange item and packaging to ship it back.

templates.name: What payment options are available?
templates.content: We accept ApplePay, Klarna, AmazonPay, ShopPay, PayPal, Google Pay, and Credit  / Debit cards with a logo from  - Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover.

templates.name: Do you ship to US territories?
templates.content:
We provide shipping services to various U.S. territories, including but not limited to Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands. You can select your specific territory as the shipping address when you check out. 

If you're shopping from outside the United States, please be aware that you'll be directed to check out using our international partner, Global-e. However, if you'd like to change this option, you can do so by selecting the country selector in the upper right corner and adjusting the shipping to the United States.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://instagram.com/fairharbor and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/fairharborclothing/

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can find more info and submit your application here https://www.fairharborclothing.com/pages/ambassador-program
